description: V2 lithology term categories — separate from v1 regex in chunks/viewer. Delete lithology_v2/ or set USE_LITHOLOGY_V2=false to revert.

categories.rock: Bedrock / consolidated matrix (counts toward rock top, not gravel well type)
categories.unconsolidated: Sand, gravel, S&G, drift — counts toward gravel/unconsolidated well type
categories.mixed: Clay-rich or ambiguous; thickness counted at 50% toward unconsolidated unless aquifer bedrock
categories.overburden: Fill/topsoil — ignored for well-type unless no other signal
categories.unknown: No rule matched — falls through to v2 heuristic rules in classify_v2.py
